basePackages.name: Chibi
basePackages.description:
✦ Angles: Head XYZ, Body XYZ
✦ Physics (movement): Eyes, Hair/Clothing/Accessories, Body
✦ Mouth Forms: 3×3
✔ Breathing
✔ Basic Expressions: Surprise, Smiling Eyes, Angry (iOS only), Blush
✘ Advanced: Crooked Mouth (iOS only), Pout (iOS only) not included
